archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) customized for Industrial Tech

hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-tight
hierarchy.label: text-xs sm:text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-blue-500

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. py-24 or py-32 for sections.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Features/Problems, Strict 3-column for Pricing. Always use grid-cols-1 on mobile.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(234,88,12,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(234,88,12,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-blue-600 text-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-900/30 hover:text-blue-400 font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-md transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 z-50 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer

cards.default: bg-[#141414] border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden
cards.glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Use 'Tracing Beam' effect on primary pricing card.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient glows behind key tech elements. No soft gray drop-shadows; use sharp contrast or colored glows.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on dark backgrounds to remove digital flatness.

animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up for grid items. Use framer-motion.
animations.micro_interactions: Hover states must have higher contrast and slight scale. WhatsApp button should have a slow pulse.

hero_background.description: Abstract tech background for hero section

hero_image.description: Industrial worker with facial recognition mesh overlay, placing this on the right side of the hero.

problem_section_images.description: Worker with generic PPE for problem section background or card
Industrial warehouse indicating management chaos without the software

icons.style: Use robust, technical icons. Stroke width 2.

page_structure.details: Logo left, Links center, 'Fale Conosco' Button right. Glassmorphism.
H1 text left with Orange highlighted keywords. Primary CTA 'Agendar Demonstração'. Right side floating hero_image.
Bento Grid showing compliance risks, manual check delays, lost PPE. Use dark red/orange subtle tints.
Steps: 1. Cadastro, 2. Reconhecimento, 3. Liberação. Use connecting tech lines.
Cards with Tech Blue icons. Highlighting offline mode, speed, and real-time dashboard.
3 Cards. Middle 'Pro' plan scaled up slightly with an Orange glowing border.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural page layouts (Hero, Bento grids) to allow overlapping and creative positioning. Avoid standard Card components for big sections.
Use Shadcn UI for the Contact Form, Inputs, and basic Buttons, but strip the Vercel-look to match the high-contrast dark theme.
Ensure the layout is completely mobile responsive, stacking grids to 1 column on small screens.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font for headings. Apply 'Cabinet Grotesk' via font-sans or custom font face.
Rely exclusively on the provided media URLs. Do not insert placeholders like 'via.placeholder.com'.
